Footer.tagline: Intrface builds AI-native platforms, products, and systems.

hero.title: We build AI-native platforms, products, and systems.
hero.body: Intrface is a product-led studio building serious software with a platform mindset. Our flagship work spans terminal-first AI tooling, tourism exploration systems, and funding workflow platforms.

whatWeDo.label: What Intrface Does
whatWeDo.title: Product clarity, system leverage, and AI that behaves like real infrastructure.
whatWeDo.body: We are not presenting disconnected experiments. The portfolio is built around durable workflow design, reusable architecture, and product surfaces that communicate value quickly.

buildProducts.title: Build products
buildProducts.text: We design and ship product surfaces that explain themselves clearly and scale beyond a one-off prototype.

designSystems.title: Design systems
designSystems.text: We create reusable foundations for navigation, typography, interaction, and content architecture across a growing portfolio.

operationalizeAi.title: Operationalize AI
operationalizeAi.text: We turn AI from a feature into working infrastructure through agents, memory, orchestration, and knowledge-aware workflows.

platformLeverage.title: Create platform leverage
platformLeverage.text: We look for repeatable systems beneath each product so the portfolio becomes more coherent over time.

featuredProducts.label: Featured Products
featuredProducts.title: Three flagship products. One portfolio shaped by shared system thinking.
featuredProducts.body: AOC, Voyager, and Funda address different domains, but they all reflect the same approach: product truth first, strong workflow structure, and software built to carry operational complexity.

aoc.summary: A terminal-first AI workspace for context-aware development, memory, task orchestration, and unified operator flow.

voyager.summary: An AI-powered tourism platform that combines exploration, mapping, multilingual content, and multi-agent guidance.

funda.summary: A funding opportunity platform built around discovery, matching, collaboration, and AI-assisted application workflows.

capabilities.label: Shared Platform Capabilities
capabilities.title: We translate technical depth into product capability.
capabilities.body: The portfolio spans different industries, but common platform muscles appear throughout the work: memory, orchestration, permissions, realtime interaction, and knowledge-aware user experience.

whyIntrface.label: Why Intrface
whyIntrface.title: Not a collection of isolated apps — a coherent product and platform practice.
whyIntrface.body: What connects the work is a bias toward durable systems. We care about how products are operated, how information persists, how interfaces stay legible under complexity, and how infrastructure becomes a strategic advantage rather than hidden overhead.

publicProductTruth.label: Public product truth
publicProductTruth.text: AOC, Voyager, and Funda are grounded in active repositories, docs, and implementation detail rather than abstract portfolio copy.

systemThinking.label: System thinking
systemThinking.text: Across products, the same concerns recur: context, orchestration, role-aware flows, navigation, and durable operator experience.

staticFirstClarity.label: Static-first clarity
staticFirstClarity.text: The site is being built to explain real products with high signal, clean structure, and room for the portfolio to grow.

finalCta.label: Final CTA
finalCta.title: Explore the portfolio, review the flagship products, or start a meaningful conversation.
finalCta.body: Intrface is building a public-facing product ecosystem around real work. If you want to talk about a product, a collaboration, or the systems underneath them, this is the right place to start.
